title: Fit test - Onboarding flow - Skip Fit Test
scenario: Fit test onboarding screen is skipped but next onboarding screen does not display after tapping Skip on Device Settings > Onboarding flow
steps: 1. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that supports fit test to the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
4. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. In Device Settings, locate and tap on Onboarding.
6. Proceed through the onboarding flow until reaching the Pairing 2 screen.
7. After the Pairing 2 screen, the Fit test screen should appear.
8. On the Fit test screen, tap the Skip button.
expected: The next onboarding screen after the Fit test screen is displayed.
